Why Order Plants Online From Us

Thanks for asking. Here are some great reasons why!

We pride ourselves with the fastest shipping service in the industry, our standard shipping times are between 2-3 days.

Handpicked from local Canadian nurseries delivered directly to your doorstep.

Happiness guaranteed If you're not happy with the condition of your plant within 15 days, we will make it right!

Need help with anything? Call, email or message our plant experts and we will guide you through your plant journey.
